title: Music Shuffle
description: Shuffle ALL released Minecraft songs. Add your own as well.
body:
![Title](https://cdn.modrinth.com/data/cached_images/16f510bc322a284d85f40ffd826f5e3743ff110f.png) Shuffles **ALL** Minecraft songs during gameplay. All official Minecraft update soundtracks are included.

**Music Player Menu** Shuffle, reorder, and skip through the queue. ![Music Player](https://cdn.modrinth.com/data/cached_images/015c69f033bb034bff6599bfddca791d67ea9e4f_0.webp)
**Track Config Menu** Disable songs from the queue. Sort and play by album. Add your own .ogg or .wav files to the directory. ![Song Config](https://cdn.modrinth.com/data/cached_images/6efa67341a03d222d5f75d8f0f7a58be9532eb63.png)
**In Game Music Toast** Appears when a new song begins to play. Visibility can by toggled. ![In Game Music Toast](https://cdn.modrinth.com/data/cached_images/a24ad35c47739d7c2ccbaf3f30c613bd5c0fa5f6.png)
**Music Player Menu Button** Accessed through the options menu or through a bindable hotkey. ![Options Menu Music Button](https://cdn.modrinth.com/data/cached_images/a0563919dcc81814aa911a13dd002855e012351d_0.webp)
**🎵 Minecraft Volumes Included** Volume Alpha Volume Beta Aquatic Update Nether Update Caves & Cliffs The Wild Update Trails & Tales Tricky Trials Chase the Skies Echoing Void (Minecraft Dungeons) _Chaos Cubed (Coming Soon)_

**🔍 About** Music disc tracks are disabled by default. Can be re-enabled through the in game config. Two loop modes. Loop song, and loop queue. Configure to allow for dimension dependent music shuffling. Music volume is controlled by the default music slider. The mod can be easily disabled with the stop button. While disabled, music control is given back to the game.
